title: Drill-down view of a widget in the Sales Dashboard - Change order of table and widget.
excerpt:
Hi! 
I’m not being able to put the table on top of the widget I click on, to see its drill-down view (this is relative to the Sales Dashboard widgets). Is it possible?

posts.author: dianapcfreitas (Diana)
posts.cookedHtml:
